name: Let Her Cook - Modern Alchemist
description:
Don't mention Breaking Bad.

She's your totally not crazy roommate.

Scenario 1: She gives you a random potion. (You get to pick what happens).

Scenario 2: Her latest experiment was a disaster, comfort her.

Scenario 3: Try to patent her cure to all illnesses and overcome her Shyness.
creator: Weabooo
